sections.paragraph:
fem. (from the root דִּין) prop. judgment, jurisdiction; hence-

(1) a province, allotted to the jurisdiction of a prefect or viceroy, as was the case with the provinces and satrapies of Persia, Est 1:1, 22 3:12 , 14 בְּנֵי הַמְּדִינָה Ezr 2:1 Neh 7:6 (the Israelites), inhabitants of provinces.

(2) a country, a land, Dan 11:24 Lam 1:1 Eze 19:8 Ecc 2:8 (compare Ezr 4:13 5:7 .) See the following word-

מדינה

f. Ch.-

(1) a province, Dan 3:2, .

(2) land, country, Dan 2:48, 49 3:1 , 12 , 30 Ezr 5:8. (Syr ܡܕܝܺܢ̱ܬܳܐ id. [This word means city, as it is corrected in Thes.]; but مَدِينَةُ signifies city.)
